title: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: മുണ്ടയൂർ മഹാദേവർ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva at Anjur of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India.
overview.description: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: മുണ്ടയൂർ മഹാദേവർ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva at Anjur of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The temple is situated near to SH-69 (Thrissur - Kuttippuram road) at Mundayur village. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing East. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol of Lord Shiva.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Avanur
topPlaces.description: Avanur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Avanur is around 3 km east of the Thrissur-Kunnamkulam highway from Mundur junction and around 8 to 9 km from Thrissur town.

topPlaces.name: Anjur
topPlaces.description: Anjur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Peramangalam
topPlaces.description: Peramangalam is an Indian village in the Indian state of Kerala. The village is an example of a culturally rich region in Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Chittilappilly
topPlaces.description: Chittilappilly is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a part of Adat Grama Panchayat, near its borders with Kaiparambu and Tholur Grama Panchayats.

topPlaces.name: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva is located at Avanur, Thrissur district, Kerala. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Amala Nagar
topPlaces.description: Amala Nagar is an Indian village in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It has Amala Institute of Medical Sciences, one of medical colleges of Thrissur district (And after which the place itself is named).

topPlaces.name: Choolissery
topPlaces.description: Choolissery is a residential township in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is surrounded by paddy fields and is 5 mins drive away from Thrissur city .

topPlaces.name: Kaiparamba
topPlaces.description: Kaiparambu is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Kaiparambu is a village belonging to Kaiparamba panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mundayur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mundayur Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mundayur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mundayur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mundayur Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mundayur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mundayur Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mundayur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avanur, Anjur, Peramangalam, Chittilappilly, Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple.
